title: Build Dark KillZone shooter game

requirements.text: Create a landing page with a hero section featuring the title 'ENTER THE BATTLE', a 'START GAME' button, and a dark radial gradient background transitioning from #111 to #000

quotes: ENTER THE BATTLE

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section occupies 90vh height
Title text has red glow effect and pulsing animation
Button has hover effect with scale and red glow
Background uses radial gradient from #111 to #000

requirements.text: Implement a navigation bar with 'Dark KillZone' branding in red (#ff003c) with glow effect, semi-transparent dark background with backdrop blur
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar spans full width with padding 15px 40px
Brand text color is #ff003c with red glow shadow effect
Background is rgba(0,0,0,0.7) with 5px backdrop blur

requirements.text: Build a 2D canvas-based shooter game with HTML5 Canvas (500x400px) that displays when the START GAME button is clicked, hiding the landing page
acceptanceCriteria: Canvas is 500x400 pixels with dark background (#111) and red border
Game area is hidden initially and displays when START GAME is clicked
Landing page hero section hides when game starts

requirements.text: Implement player character as a red square (30x30px) positioned at the bottom center of the canvas, controllable with left/right arrow keys moving 20px per press
acceptanceCriteria: Player renders as red 30x30px square
Player starts at x=250, y=360
Arrow left key moves player 20px left
Arrow right key moves player 20px right

requirements.text: Implement shooting mechanics where spacebar fires yellow bullets (5x10px) upward from the player position at 5px per frame
acceptanceCriteria: Spacebar creates new bullet at player position
Bullets render as yellow 5x10px rectangles
Bullets move upward at 5px per frame
Bullets are removed when they exit the top of canvas

requirements.text: Implement enemy spawning system that creates white square enemies (30x30px) at random x positions at the top of the canvas every 1 second, moving downward at 2px per frame
acceptanceCriteria: New enemy spawns every 1000ms
Enemies spawn at random x position (0-480) at y=0
Enemies render as white 30x30px squares
Enemies move downward at 2px per frame

requirements.text: Implement collision detection between bullets and enemies that destroys both objects on contact using rectangular bounding box detection
acceptanceCriteria: Collision detection checks all bullet-enemy pairs each frame
Both bullet and enemy are removed when collision occurs
Collision uses rectangular bounding box algorithm

requirements.text: Implement game loop using requestAnimationFrame that continuously clears the canvas and redraws all game entities (player, bullets, enemies)
acceptanceCriteria: Game loop runs using requestAnimationFrame
Canvas is cleared every frame before redrawing
All entities (player, bullets, enemies) are rendered each frame

requirements.text: Apply consistent dark theme styling with red accent color (#ff003c), including glow effects on interactive elements and text shadows
acceptanceCriteria: Primary accent color is #ff003c (red)
Text elements use red glow shadow effects
Interactive elements scale and glow on hover
Overall theme maintains dark aesthetic with red highlights

constraints: Game must use HTML5 Canvas for rendering
Canvas dimensions must be exactly 500x400 pixels
All game logic must run client-side in the browser

required: Dark atmospheric hero background image with combat/battle theme for landing page (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
